summary: Iteration 74 - Homepage ARS 1000 Features Testing Complete. All features working correctly: Hero section badges (Conforme EUDR, Traçabilité Carbone, ARS 1000 Ready), Features section with 8 cards including 'Conformité ARS 1000' with yellow badge, HowItWorks section with 3 step cards, Carbon Calculator modal, and USSD Simulator at /farmer/prime-carbone. Backend API POST /api/ussd/calculate-premium returns score, eligible, ars_level correctly. 9/9 backend tests passed (100%).

context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage ARS 1000 features fully tested and working. Key fixes verified: 1) FeaturesSection and HowItWorksSection now properly check for empty API responses before overriding mock data. 2) Hero section has 3 badges including new 'ARS 1000 Ready'. 3) USSD Simulator at /farmer/prime-carbone uses /api/ussd/carbon-calculator endpoint (9-question flow). 4) POST /api/ussd/calculate-premium returns ARS 1000 compliance data (ars_level, ars_pct, ars_conseil). Orange Money and SMS are MOCKED.

mocked_api_note.Orange SMS API: MOCKED - SMS logged but not sent
